# Runna: Allenamento Corsa · Fitness

Generated: Jul 22, 2026, 11:11 AM

## **Contents** {#toc}

- [Bugs and stability](#theme-bugs_stability)
- [Pricing and paywall](#theme-pricing_paywall)


## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 7, 2026 - Jul 3, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Steveg1979_, Jul 3, 2026, 1/5: "I found the app buggy, for example it would randomly not allow me to start recording a run even after restarting the app. Synching issues with Strave. Calories burned data was inaccurate, in one case I burned less calories in a 10k run than a 7k run! Message support and you get the scripted answer of check latest version of the app; data signal blah blah with no further help. Gave up and went onto Strava paid version."
            2. _zuba_7_, Jun 28, 2026, 1/5: "I asked many times how can I fix this issue but the app still doesn't work and keeps telling me to run to a certain pace even if I clearly cannot due to the temperature of Rome rising day by day."
            3. _Calum7282_, Jun 4, 2026, 1/5: "App was good but now during workouts it reduces the sound of any music app or YouTube to a whisper which makes it almost unusable. If you try to refresh the app to fix it then it changes how far you’ve ran and there isn’t a way to edit this at the end."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      4 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 1, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Mini Duffy_, Jul 6, 2026, 1/5: "Locked behind a paywall when it never used to be!"
            2. _Twatwagon_, Jul 14, 2026, 2/5: "I’ve been using Runna on and off for a year-ish. I’m accident prone but genuinely found the return to running plan to be the best plan for me. I’m finally injury free so decided to try again only to find anything after week 1 for ANY run now hidden behind a paywall?? I already pay for Strava, I’m not paying £100 for a year when there are free alternatives. Absolute joke."
